description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a black matte finish and a collapsible stock for adjustable length. The upper receiver is equipped with a carry handle and integrated iron sights, while one variant displays a red dot or holographic sight mounted on a rail. The rifle has a detachable box magazine and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is of standard length, and some variants include an under-barrel attachment, likely a grenade launcher, enhancing its versatility. The overall construction appears robust, primarily composed of metal and polymer components, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and both iron and optical sight options. Features include a pistol grip, standard barrel, and an under-barrel attachment.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the top and bottom, showing the slim profile and alignment of the barrel, stock, and under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Side views reveal the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and both iron and optical sight variants, as well as the under-barrel attachment.
description_view_2: Another top and bottom view, emphasizing the linear arrangement of the barrel, handguard, and stock, with minimal detail on side features.
description_view_3: Side views similar to view 1, highlighting the different sighting systems and the under-barrel attachment, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
